About Us

Crafting Spaces,
Illuminating Brands

Furniture House & LED Sign Board is Jamui's most trusted destination for premium CNC furniture and custom LED signage. Based on Station Road, near Vishnu Bajaj, we serve homes, offices, and businesses across Bihar with quality-first craftsmanship.

From CNC carved furniture and MDF 3D door designs to glowing LED sign boards that make your brand shine — we do it all under one roof with the latest machines.

EVA-II Laser Machine
LX-II-1325 CNC Router
Acrylic & LED Boards
Custom Design Options
On-Site Installation
After-Sales Support
Our Services

What We Offer

From precision CNC carving to ultra-bright LED boards — we bring quality and creativity together.

01

CNC Furniture Carving

Precision CNC-carved doors, panels, temple designs, and decorative pieces using our LX-II-1325 router machine.

02

Laser Cutting & Engraving

EVA-II laser machine for precise MDF cutting, acrylic engraving, and intricate custom designs for homes and shops.

03

LED Sign Boards

Eye-catching LED signage for shops, offices, DJs, hospitals and more. Neon flex, glow boards, acrylic letters — all crafted in-house.

LED Sign Boards

Glowing Signs That Command Attention

Custom-made LED sign boards for businesses, shops, events and institutions across Bihar.

Showroom Display
LED Letter Boards & Backlit Signs
Custom LED Board
Open now- LED Light
Professional Signage
Hospital Circular Logo Board
Brand Boards
Samsung · Oppo · Vivo Acrylic Logos
CNC Craftsmanship

Precision CNC Wood Carving

Our LX-II-1325 CNC router carves intricate patterns, temple designs, and 3D door cuts with millimetre precision.

🔧 Live CNC Carving

Every piece is designed digitally and executed with surgical precision using our professional-grade CNC router. From decorative MDF panels to full temple carvings — we bring your vision to life in wood.

Temple & Religious Carvings

Intricate Ganesha, Durga, and floral motifs

3D Door Panels

Custom 3D MDF door designs for homes and offices

Decorative Wall Panels

Laser-cut acrylic & MDF wall art and partitions

Acrylic Branding Boards

Precision-cut acrylic logos and signage

How We Work

Our 4-Step Process

From concept to installation — every project is handled with care and precision.

1

Design

You share your idea. We create a digital blueprint tailored to your space and brand.

2

CNC Cutting

Our LX-II-1325 and EVA-II machines execute the design with sub-millimetre accuracy.

3

Finishing

LED fitting, polishing, painting, and quality check before every delivery.

4

Installation

Our team delivers and professionally installs your product at your location.

Why Choose Us

Built on Trust & Quality

Thousands of happy customers across Bihar trust us for their furniture and signage needs.

Advanced Machinery

EVA-II laser & LX-II-1325 CNC router for unmatched precision in every product we make.

Competitive Pricing

Best-in-class products at the most fair prices in Jamui. Quality should be accessible to everyone.

Custom Designs

Every client is unique. We listen to your vision and craft solutions that perfectly match your style.

Fast Delivery

Quick turnaround without cutting corners. Delivered and installed on time across Jamui and nearby areas.
